author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: fix(maps): add support for default refinement in GeoSearch (algolia/react-instantsearch#1399)
body:
* fix(connectGeoSearch): avoid to use default refinement for position

* test(connectGeoSearch): rename results factory in case of multi index

* test(connectGeoSearch): rename results factory in case of single index

* test(connectGeoSearch): move SCU top level

* feat(GeoSearch): support default refinement

* chore(stories): add Geo with default refinement
